title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
summary: AutoGPT 是一个开源项目，旨在让每个人都能轻松使用和构建 AI 代理。它提供了自主代理框架，支持 GPT、Claude、Llama 等多种 LLM，专注于让用户专注于重要事务，而无需深入底层技术。该项目拥有超过 18.5 万星标，是 AI 代理领域的热门工具。
summary_en: AutoGPT is an open-source project that aims to make AI accessible for everyone to use and build upon. It provides an autonomous agent framework supporting various LLMs like GPT, Claude, and Llama, allowing users to focus on what matters without delving into underlying technologies. With over 185k stars, it is a popular tool in the AI agent space.
